title: Plan VPC Subnet Capacity
description:
## How Many /24 Subnets in a VPC?

You are designing a VPC with the CIDR **`10.0.0.0/16`** and want to carve it into **`/24`** subnets (one per AZ/tier).

**Your task:** compute how many **`/24`** subnets fit in `10.0.0.0/16` and write just the number to **`/root/subnets.txt`**.

> 💡 Each step up in prefix length (e.g. /16 → /24 is 8 bits) multiplies the subnet count by 2^8. Python's `ipaddress` module can enumerate `subnets(new_prefix=24)`.

validation.description: Checks that /root/subnets.txt contains the number of /24s in a /16 (256).
